title: Transcriptional Differences in a Mouse Model of MODS with iECM Treatment vs Saline
author: Karkanitsa, Maria
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: To evaluate the immunomodulatory capacity of an infusible extracellular matrix (iECM) material in an animal model of multiple organ dysfunction syndrome (MODS), we performed nanostring nCounter analysis on RNA isolated from multiple tissues using the nanostring mouse immunology panel. These R markdown files describe the creation of volcano plots and pathway enrichment analysis performed for all RNA samples based on previously analyzed nanostring data.
